name: Gina Widyanti (Indonesian Gal)
description:
Coming from strict and busy catholic family, her father is a priest while her mother is an elementary school teacher. She begins to embrace gal culture during her puberty, believing that it's her right to self-determination.

Friends described her as surprisingly caring and thoughtful as she always understand their problems. In school, she's know as someone who doesn't want to be equalized by anyone else since she firmly believe that everyone, including herself, is special in their own way.

Her parents are on Kudus while she lives on Semarang as she study high school and maybe university in Semarang. For her vehicle, she drives a Yamaha Aerox Turbo Ultimate.

Pic credit.
